supportCards.title: First periods, explained gently
supportCards.body: Simple answers for young users and caregivers, with age-appropriate language and no shame.

supportCards.title: Care routines that feel practical
supportCards.body: Menstrual hygiene, personal hygiene, and intimate care guidance that is easy to act on.

supportCards.title: Health education with empathy
supportCards.body: Trusted information that makes room for questions, curiosity, and privacy.

pillars: Education designed for rural and semi-urban communities

journeySteps.title: Choose the right language
journeySteps.body: Users start with the language they understand best, so the experience feels familiar from the first screen.

journeySteps.title: Ask a question or open a lesson
journeySteps.body: The interface supports casual conversation as well as structured education modules for deeper learning.

journeySteps.title: Save progress and continue later
journeySteps.body: The product flow is designed to support repeat visits, progress tracking, and future personalization.

chatMessages.text: I am nervous about my first period. What should I know?
That is completely okay. I can explain the signs, what to keep ready, and how to stay comfortable without overwhelming you.
If you want, I can also show a simple checklist or help you talk to a trusted adult.

quickPrompts: How do I stay clean safely?
How do I talk to my mother?

journeyAudiences.title: First-time learner
journeyAudiences.body: Start with simple explanations, age-appropriate terms, and a calm tone that reduces anxiety.

journeyAudiences.title: Caregiver support
journeyAudiences.body: Get practical guidance for answering questions clearly and compassionately at home.

journeyAudiences.title: Returning learner
journeyAudiences.body: Revisit topics, track what you have learned, and continue from the last lesson or chat.

hero.title: Support that feels warm, clear, and quietly confident.
hero.description: Sakhi AI helps girls and women learn about periods, hygiene, puberty, nutrition, mental wellbeing, and emergency awareness in language that feels safe and easy to trust.

liveGuidance.title: Ask softly. Learn clearly.
liveGuidance.description: The interface is designed to feel calm, respectful, and safe for first-time users, caregivers, and younger learners alike.

card1.title: Designed for trust
card1.body: Clear explanations, privacy-aware UX, and a tone that never feels rushed or dismissive.

card2.title: Accessible by default
card2.body: Large type, gentle contrast, and layout choices that work smoothly across screen sizes.

chatSection.title: A calm conversation that teaches without overwhelming.
chatSection.description: The first interaction should feel reassuring, especially for users who are shy, anxious, or asking for the first time.

supportSection.title: A gentle foundation for the first version.
supportSection.description: The first frontend experience should make the platform feel calm, trustworthy, and ready for future learning flows.

journeySection.title: A simple path from curiosity to confidence.
journeySection.description: The navigation should help users understand where to start, how to learn, and how to return later without friction.

languagesSection.title: Multilingual by design, not as an afterthought.
languagesSection.description: The app should make users feel at home in the language they choose first, while keeping content consistent and easy to extend later.
languagesSection.whyItMattersText: Language is part of safety. When users can understand the UI immediately, they can focus on learning instead of translating.

card1.title: Readable on mobile
card1.body: Responsive sections keep text comfortable to scan even on smaller screens.

card2.title: Extendable later
card2.body: The structure is ready for localized content and additional regional languages.

safetySection.title: Helpful guidance without crossing into medical advice.
safetySection.description: The interface should make the platform feel supportive while preserving clear boundaries around education and professional care.

login.gentleGuidance: Gentle guidance for girls and women
login.description: Sign in to continue your learning journey with Sakhi and get calm, trusted support whenever you need it.
login.privacyNotice: 🔒 Your data is private and never shared.

errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.general: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Join thousands of women learning with Sakhi AI.
register.passwordHint: Use a mix of letters and numbers.
register.privacyNotice: 🔒 Your privacy is our priority. We never share your data.

errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.general: Something went wrong. Please try again.

step1.title: What should we call you?
step1.subtitle: Sakhi wants to greet you by name.

step2.title: Which age group are you in?
step2.subtitle: This helps Sakhi personalise your experience.

caregiver.label: Caregiver / Mother
caregiver.desc: Learning for someone I care for
